reason: Claude review comments and pi runtime audit findings addressed; focused local gates pass. Full make verify did not exit 0 in CI: the certify package timed out (10m per-package limit) on the pre-existing slow TestWriteStagesLedgerWrittenBeforeCreate, which is unrelated to this PR's diff (base branch certify package is 298s vs 299s here). Re-running CI is required before merge; verificationPassed is false until a full make verify exits 0.

details.verificationNote: verificationPassed is false because full make verify did not exit 0. All focused gates below pass. Per the gate-integrity rule in gsd-universal-runtime-loop.md, a timeout is not verification completion.
